content.text:
<user_query>
Explore frontend chat architecture and identify all files powering Soundboard/MySoundBoard/Ask-like chat. Find duplication points, route entry points, layout wrappers, and where to rename to Ask BIQc while keeping BIQc color system. Return prioritized file list and a concise migration sequence.
</user_query>
Searching the codebase for chat-related routes, components, and naming patterns.

Here is a concise report based on the repo at `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn`.

## Architecture (Ask-like / Soundboard chat)

There are **two live chat surfaces** that hit the same backend (`/soundboard/*`):

1. **Embedded rail** — `SoundboardPanel` inside `DashboardLayout` on most app pages (desktop right column + mobile FAB/overlay). Hidden when the user is on the dedicated soundboard route so the panel is not duplicated.
2. **Full-page** — `MySoundBoard` at `/soundboard`, also wrapped in `DashboardLayout` (main content is the large chat UI).

A third file, `FloatingSoundboard.js`, implements a similar chat (same API, similar patterns) but **`grep` shows it is not imported anywhere** in `frontend/src` — it is effectively dead/orphan code (consistent with notes in `test_reports/iteration_91.json`).

There is **no separate `/ask` route**; “Ask-like” behavior is this Soundboard chat plus copy such as TutorialOverlay’s “Ask Anything” and proactive “Ask Soundboard” in `ProactiveInsightBubble.js`.

---

## Route entry points

| Location | Role |
|----------|------|
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\App.js` | `<Route path="/soundboard" element={<ProtectedRoute><MySoundBoard /></ProtectedRoute>} />` |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\config\routeAccessConfig.js` | `'/soundboard': { minTier: 'free', launchType: 'free' }` |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\config\launchConfig.js` | `FREE_LAUNCH_ROUTES` includes `'/soundboard'` |

---

## Layout wrapper

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\DashboardLayout.js` | Shell: sidebar, header, mobile nav, **resize key** `biqc_soundboard_width`, **embedded** `SoundboardPanel`, `hideEmbeddedSoundboard` when `pathname === '/soundboard'`, nav item `{ id: 'soundboard', label: 'Soundboard', path: '/soundboard' }` |

`MySoundBoard.js` imports `DashboardLayout` and renders the full-page chat as children.

---

## Duplication points

- **`buildBoardroomChecks`** — duplicated verbatim in `SoundboardPanel.js` and `MySoundBoard.js`.
- **`getSoundboardErrorMessage`** — three similar implementations (`SoundboardPanel.js`, `MySoundBoard.js`, `FloatingSoundboard.js`).
- **`DATA_QUERY_PATTERNS` / `isDataQuery`** — in `SoundboardPanel.js` and `FloatingSoundboard.js`; **not** in `MySoundBoard.js` (that page uses `deriveRequestScope` and other helpers instead), so integration/routing logic can diverge.
- **POST `/soundboard/chat`** and conversation list/load flows — parallel implementations in panel vs full page (and again in `FloatingSoundboard.js`).
- **`FloatingSoundboard.js`** — duplicate feature surface; **unused** in the bundle (merge or delete to reduce drift).
- **Shared (good)** — `BoardroomCouncilCard`, `getSoundboardPolicy` / `SOUND_BOARD_MODES` in `soundboardPolicy.js`, `VoiceChat` (referenced from panel and full page).

---

## BIQc color system (keep as-is for rename)

Central tokens live in **`C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\index.css`** (`--biqc-bg`, `--biqc-brand`, etc.). Chat UIs already use these (e.g. `var(--biqc-bg-input)`, `var(--biqc-border)` in `DashboardLayout` / panels). **Renaming UI to “Ask BIQc” does not require changing these variables** — only user-visible strings, routes, analytics keys, and `data-testid` prefixes if you standardize naming.

---

## Prioritized file list (migration / rename to “Ask BIQc”)

**P0 — core behavior & naming**

1. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\App.js`
2. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\DashboardLayout.js`
3. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\pages\MySoundBoard.js`
4. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\SoundboardPanel.js`
5. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\config\routeAccessConfig.js`
6. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\config\launchConfig.js`
7. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\MobileNav.js` (Soundboard nav label + path)

**P1 — deep links, handoff, analytics**

8. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\pages\AdvisorWatchtower.js` (`openSoundboardWithBrief`, `biqc_soundboard_handoff`, links to `/soundboard`)
9. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\ProactiveInsightBubble.js` (`biqc_soundboard_prefill`, “Ask Soundboard”)
10. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\context\SupabaseAuthContext.js` (clears `biqc_soundboard_*` keys on logout)
11. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\lib\analytics.js` (`EVENTS` soundboard_*)
12. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\lib\soundboardPolicy.js` (file/name exports if you rename module; modes already say “BIQc”)

**P2 — product copy, onboarding, marketing**

13. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\pages\OnboardingWizard.js`
14. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\DailyBriefCard.js`
15. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\pages\DecisionsPage.js`
16. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\config\pricingTiers.js` / `tiers.js`
17. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\website\*` (e.g. `SoundboardFlagshipStage.js`, `LiquidSteelHeroRotator.js`, `HeroExperienceTabs.js`, `ModernIntegrationBanner.js`)
18. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\pages\Landing.js`
19. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\TutorialOverlay.js` (“Ask Anything” alignment)
20. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\VoiceChat.js` (“MySoundBoard” string)
21. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\pages\PromptLab.js` (color key `MySoundBoard`)

**P3 — dead code / consolidation**

22. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\components\FloatingSoundboard.js` (resolve: wire up, merge FileReader into panel, or remove)

**Mobile / CSS testids**

23. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\mobile.css` (`soundboard-page`, `soundboard-input`)

**Outside this frontend (if API path should match “Ask”)**

24. `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\mobile\src\screens\ChatScreen.tsx` (same `/soundboard/*` API)

---

## Concise migration sequence (rename to “Ask BIQc”, keep BIQc colors)

1. **Decide URL strategy** — keep `/soundboard` with redirects from a new path (e.g. `/ask-biqc`), or rename route and add `<Navigate>` from old path; update `FREE_LAUNCH_ROUTES`, `ROUTE_ACCESS_MAP`, `DashboardLayout` `hideEmbeddedSoundboard` and nav `path`.
2. **Rename user-visible strings** — nav (`MobileNav`, `DashboardLayout` sidebar), `MySoundBoard` title, `VoiceChat`, proactive CTA, onboarding/decisions links, marketing pages. **Do not change** `index.css` `--biqc-*` unless you want a separate theme tweak.
3. **Session/analytics** — optionally rename `biqc_soundboard_*` storage keys with a one-time migration read of old keys; update `EVENTS` in `analytics.js` and any dashboards that depend on old event names.
4. **`data-testid`** — batch rename `soundboard-*` testids if E2E depends on them (`mobile.css` selectors too).
5. **Reduce duplication** — extract `buildBoardroomChecks`, shared error helper, and (if desired) one `useSoundboardChat` hook used by `SoundboardPanel` and `MySoundBoard`; align or share `isDataQuery` vs `deriveRequestScope` behavior.
6. **FloatingSoundboard** — delete or merge so file-attach behavior is not split across dead and live code.
7. **Backend** — if REST paths stay `/soundboard/*`, no server change for branding-only; renaming API routes is a separate coordinated change with `mobile` and any `apiClient` callers.

This gives you a single mental model: **`DashboardLayout` + (`SoundboardPanel` | `MySoundBoard`)** as the live stack, **`FloatingSoundboard`** as legacy/unmounted duplicate, and **`index.css` variables** as the stable BIQc visual system for the rename.
